mapper.select: select uuid, uploadpath, filename, p_a.p_code, p_price, p_name, p_type from productattach p_a left outer join product p on p_a.p_code = p.p_code where t_amount > 0 order by p_sale

select uuid, uploadpath, filename, p_a.p_code, p_price, p_name, p_type from productattach p_a left outer join product p on p_a.p_code = p.p_code where t_amount > 0 and p_type LIKE '%'||#{p_type}||'%' order by p_sale
